subcodes.first_line: Be not grieved by tribulation, for this is an immutable decree. The near ones to the Divine Threshold have ever remained sanctified in this earthly realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از پريشانی محزون مباش زيرا امريست مسنون. مقرّبان درگاه کبريا هميشه در اين دار دنيا مقدّس
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort
